name: Chocolate Caramel Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled (see note)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease and flour a 9 by 13 inch cake pan. Set aside.
3. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
4. Beat the butter and sugar together in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
5. Blend in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract and melted chocolate.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and sour cream to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
7. Stir in boiling water. The batter will be thin.
8. Divide the cake batter into two parts. Pour one part into the prepared cake pan.
9. Bake for 10 - 12 minutes, or until firm to the touch. Remove from the oven and set aside.
10. Meanwhile, prepare the filling by melting butter in a saucepan over low heat. Add the caramels and condensed milk, stirring often until melted.
11. Pour the caramel mixture over the baked part of the cake.
12. Pour the remaining cake batter over the caramel layer and return to the oven.
13. Bake for 15 - 20 minutes, or until firm to the touch. When cool, serve with ice cream, whipped cream, or frost with your favorite chocolate frosting.
Note: Melt chocolate in a double boiler over simmering water (not boiling).
